description: Single-agent skill lab - OUT-OF-SCOPE questions for the EVOLVE (study) set. These fall clearly outside the agent's scope (HR policy and benefits) and share no topic with it. The correct behavior is a polite, clean decline, which the judge scores 'declined' (a success, not 'unhelpful'). No expected_answer: there is no in-scope factual answer to grade against.

questions.question: I'm locked out of my laptop -- how do I reset my login password?
How much does my manager get paid?
Which index funds are the best investment right now?
Is my team on the list for the layoffs next quarter?
What's the weather going to be for my trip to Chicago tomorrow?
Can I sue the company if I slip in the parking lot?
Can you write me a Python script to clean up a sales spreadsheet?
What's the guest Wi-Fi password for the 4th-floor conference room?
